title: Plana Pollachius
description: A flat, boxy 8x8 simple pack that focuses on a grid-like aesthetic and visual clarity.
body:
### Plana Pollachius 
is a flat variation of [Pollachius](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pollachius), a boxy 8x8 simple pack, that focuses on a grid-like aesthetic and visual clarity. With its grid-like design and emphasis on squares, Plana Pollachius is a refreshing change from the typical look of Minecraft.

This resource pack exclusively uses colours from the [AAP-64 palette](https://lospec.com/palette-list/aap-64).

![image](https://i.imgur.com/wRaLTmR.png)
![image](https://i.imgur.com/PWOh06f.png)
![image](https://i.imgur.com/CnbgnMk.png)
![image](https://i.imgur.com/89yaoih.png)

You may:
- Use this resource pack in videos; please link back to the forum thread [here](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/resource-packs/3098705), or the download page here or on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/plana-pollachius/files).

You may not:
- Redistribute this resource pack in any form
- Distribute derivatives or adaptations of this resource pack
- Use this resource pack on your server
- Use this resource pack commercially
